expectations.evidence: The component implements debouncing manually using useRef and setTimeout instead of using useDebouncedFetcherQuery
debounceDelay prop defaults to 300ms and is used in setTimeout

expectations.text: setQuery is used to update search parameters

expectations.text: Handles loading state during debounce and execution
expectations.evidence: Component manages isPending and loading states manually with useState

workarounds: Manual debounce implementation instead of using the skill's useDebouncedFetcherQuery

suggestions.reason: Baseline doesn't use the fetcher-react library at all, implementing debounce logic from scratch
